title: Build a quality regression suite
description: Wire the golden set, metrics, and significance checks into a repeatable suite that flags quality regressions per change.
body: Steps: 1. Package the frozen golden set, metrics, and judge into a runnable harness. 2. Establish a baseline score with variance for the current system. 3. Run the suite on each candidate change and compare to baseline with significance. 4. Segment results so a regression in one category is visible. 5. Gate the change on no significant regression in any critical segment. Rollback point: before merging a change that moves a segment down. Validation: a deliberately worse system is caught by the suite as a significant regression.
